form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, 4th in a small field at this track on March 7 over 274m, 3.5 len behind Js Pyc carrying 56kg at $2.90. Encouraging signs on debut and is worth following up.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. When well in the market at debut, sat on the pace when 2nd of 7 at this track on March 6 over 274m, 0.5 len behind Dulce Vale carrying 57kg at $4.50. Second-up ran last of 8 at this track in LR on March 21 over 274m, 4.5 len behind Vaquerita 4 with 56kg at $25.50. Well-placed and should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Lining up for just third start. When well in the market at debut, sat on the pace when 2nd of 7 at this track on March 6 over 274m, 0.5 len behind Dulce Vale carrying 57kg at $4.50. Second-up ran last of 8 at this track in LR on March 21 over 274m, 4.5 len behind Vaquerita 4 with 56kg at $25.50. Well-placed and should prove hard to beat.
